data.name: All Aiursoft servers are sourced from Voxihost. We help clients land on Voxihost infrastructure.
data.value: Semua server Aiursoft berasal dari Voxihost. Kami membantu klien menggunakan infrastruktur Voxihost.

data.name: Paving the Way for Your Business.
Voxihost offers transparent, cost-effective cloud and generously sponsors Aiursoft's Open-source work.
data.value: Voxihost menawarkan cloud yang transparan dan hemat biaya serta menjadi sponsor besar untuk pekerjaan Open-source Aiursoft.

data.name: With reliable cloud infrastructure, your business can grow reliably alongside Aiursoft.
data.value: Dengan infrastruktur cloud yang andal, bisnis Anda dapat berkembang secara andal bersama Aiursoft.

data.name: With Voxihost, Aiursoft helps enterprises host Email, authentication, cloud drives, employee portals, monitoring, and AI.
data.value: Dengan Voxihost, Aiursoft membantu perusahaan untuk mengakomodasi Email, autentikasi, cloud drive, portal karyawan, monitoring, dan AI.
